briefdescription.para: 2D array containing precomputed filter coefficients for a 6-tap Lanczos2 horizontal scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This constant array holds the coefficients for each phase of the horizontal scaling operation, using a 6-tap Lanczos2 filter. The array is indexed first by the phase (from 0 to XV_HSCALER_MAX_H_PHASES-1), and then by the tap index (from 0 to XV_HSCALER_TAPS_6-1).
These coefficients are used by the horizontal scaler hardware or software to perform high-quality image resampling with minimal artifacts.
